blocks.text: This slice moves the executable store distribution contract into the public daemon repository.

The gate fixes public daemon boundaries for Developer ID, Mac App Store, MSIX sideload, and Microsoft Store review surfaces. It makes provider CLI non-bundling, store-managed update rules, local-only IPC, App Sandbox/login item expectations, Windows named pipe/package-local data expectations, demo review account surface, and privacy metadata allowlist requirements executable.

This slice does not build, sign, notarize, submit, or package app bundles/MSIX artifacts. It does not bundle provider CLIs, move private infra/account artifacts, or change the control-plane review account runtime seed.
